settings.title: Settings
garage.welcome: Good morning, Amelia! Your bus is all fixed and ready. Let's go!
mom.name: Mom
pim.hi: Hi! I'm Pim the fire truck. Ready to help!
hux.hi: I'm Hux! I can tow anything home.
bea.hi: Bea here! I help everyone feel better.
skip.hi: Skip the helicopter, ready to fly!
pip.hello: Hi Amelia! Can you take me to the park?
pip.thanks: Thank you, Amelia! See you soon!
m.dawn: Good morning, Amelia! Time for your first day.
m.goStop: Let's pick up a friend. Follow the arrow to the bus stop.
m.pickup: Stop at the bus stop and open the doors.
m.dropoffHint: Now let's take Pip to the park. Mind the traffic lights!
m.chooseRight: Turn right to reach the park!
m.home: Great work! Head back home to the garage.
m.parkArrive: Here we are at the park! Bye-bye, Pip!
m.tour: Let's drive home the long way and see the whole town!
m.allAboard: All aboard, Pip! Next stop — the school.
m.dropSchool: Here's the school! Have a great day, Pip!
hud.pickUpPip: Pick up Pip at the bus stop
find.tryAgain: So close! Steer to another one and beep!
find.spotRedBalloon: Beep your horn at the RED balloon!
light.redStop: Red light. Stop and wait here.
light.greenGo: Green light! Now we can go.
light.goodStop: Great job stopping at the red light!
episode.firstDay.title: First Day Driving
reward.complete: You did it! Mom gives you a big hug.
